name: ctpV
function: Copper-translocating P-type ATPase involved in copper homeostasis, also a putative P1B-type ATPase and copper exporter (PMID 39663556, PMID 21925112). Functions as a heavy metal efflux pump (PMID 21925112).
drug_susc_impact: potentially interesting targets for discovering treatments against mycobacteria (PMID 21925112)
infection_impact: Unique immune response profile in mice, generating a robust Th1-biased T-cell response (PMID 39663556).  Intraphagosomal zinc accumulation and zinc retention within the mycobacterial cytoplasm, leading to impaired intracellular growth (PMID 21925112). Contributes to intracellular survival and altered virulence patterns in vivo (PMID 21925112).
